title: Additional Froglights
description: This mod adds a froglight for Red, Orange, Lime, Cyan, Light Blue, Blue, Magenta and Pink dyes.
body:
## Blocks
This mod adds a froglight for the following dyes:
- Red
- Orange
- Lime
- Cyan
- Light Blue
- Blue
- Magenta
- Pink

*Ochre* **=** *Yellow*

*Verdant* **=** *Green*

*Pearlescent* **=** *Purple*


## Recipes
This mod adds a recipe to turn any froglight to any other froglight with their corresponding dye.
